title: Medical & Health Benefits
description: Health insurance plan tiers, dental & vision cover, sick pay schedule, and EAP support.

articles.title: Medical Insurance Tiers, Deductibles, and Enrolment
articles.content:
Eligibility & Enrolment: Permanent employees eligible from date of hire; fixed-term contractors (6+ months) eligible from 2nd month. Enrol during November Annual Enrolment or within 30 days of a qualifying life event in Workday Benefits module.
Plan Tiers:
1. Essential Tier: 0% employee contribution (100% Bank-funded). Deductible: GBP 500 individual / GBP 1,000 family. Max out-of-pocket: GBP 2,500.
2. Standard Tier: 15% employee contribution. Deductible: GBP 250 individual / GBP 500 family. Max out-of-pocket: GBP 1,500.
3. Premium Tier: 30% employee contribution. Deductible: GBP 0. Max out-of-pocket: GBP 750 (includes single-room hospitalisation & expanded international network).
Coverage: All tiers include hospitalisation, outpatient, prescription drugs, maternity care, and mental health. Pre-existing conditions are covered from Day 1.

articles.title: Employee Assistance Programme (EAP) & Sick Leave Pay Schedule
articles.content:
Employee Assistance Programme (EAP):
• Free 24/7 confidential phone and web portal access for employees and household members.
• Up to 8 confidential counselling sessions per issue per year (mental health, family, legal, financial). Usage is completely anonymous and not shared with managers.
Sick Leave & Absence Pay Schedule:
• Absences >3 days require a medical certificate; notify manager before start time in Workday.
• Weeks 1 - 4: Full Pay
• Weeks 5 - 12: Full Pay (subject to Occupational Health engagement)
• Weeks 13 - 26: Half Pay (topped up by statutory/insured benefit)
• Beyond 26 weeks: Statutory pay / Income Protection Insurance.

articles.title: Dental, Vision, Health Screenings, and Fertility Cover
articles.content:
Dental & Vision Add-Ons (Selectable during Annual Enrolment):
• Dental Cover (GBP 12/month): 2 free check-ups/year; 50% co-pay on restorative work up to GBP 1,000/year.
• Vision Cover (GBP 6/month): Free annual eye test; GBP 150 allowance toward glasses or lenses.
Health Screenings & Flu Shots: Free annual preventive screening for Standard/Premium tiers; subsidised autumn flu shots on-site for all tiers.
Parental & Fertility Support: Standard and Premium tiers include up to GBP 5,000 lifetime allowance toward fertility treatment and adoption costs, plus returner coaching.
Leavers & Retirees: Cover continuation up to 3 months via COBRA-equivalent option. Retirees (10+ years service at retirement age) eligible for Retiree Medical Plan.
